questions.q: A Regina man was fined $75,000 and sentenced after pleading guilty to falsifying 31 documents related to what federal process?

Ottawa recently announced that a first-of-its-kind multinational defence bank, designed to lower the cost of financing major military purchases for NATO partners, will be headquartered in which country?
On May 1, 2026, NASA released Landsat 9 satellite imagery showing severe landslide scars in Papua New Guinea that were triggered by which extreme weather event?
RCMP launched an investigation after an Alberta separatist group called The Centurion Project was ordered by a court to take down what publicly posted information?
options: A list of voters and their addresses
questions.correctText: A list of voters and their addresses

questions.q: The UK's national terror threat level was raised to what status on May 1, 2026, following a stabbing attack in Golders Green?
According to a study reported by Disability Scoop on May 1, 2026, a review of over 5,000 social media posts found widespread misinformation primarily regarding which neurodivergence topics?

In early May 2026, the U.S. government issued an ultimatum to Zambia threatening to withdraw support for 1.3 million people in what critical health program if American firms were not granted priority mineral access?
